meaning: n.愚人,白痴,莽汉,受骗者,奶油拌水果vt.愚弄,欺骗,浪费vi.干傻事,开玩笑,游荡adj.傻的
examples: Oh you fool! You've blown it!
Art dealers fool a lot of people.
Despite his name, Cartier was no jeweller: he had found worthless quartz crystals and fool's gold.
"Anyone who goes from totally invested to totally uninvested is a fool, " says Wigmore.
